name: task-scheduler
description: Turn deadlines, workload, and blockers into a realistic task schedule.

interface.shortDescription: Build realistic schedules from tasks, deadlines, and capacity.
interface.longDescription: Task Scheduler turns raw tasks into a day-by-day plan with workload balancing, blocked dates, overflow tracking, and reusable MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Task Scheduler to plan my week around deadlines and blocked days.
Use Task Scheduler to turn this task list into a realistic schedule.
Use Task Scheduler to spot overflow and capacity risks in this plan.
